grant_title: Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act (WIOA) Youth and Young Adults Funding for South Central Connecticut
geographic_restrictions: South Central Connecticut Workforce Region (including New Haven, Wallingford, and surrounding areas)
project_area: Work-based learning, employability programs, green jobs training, academic and career development, leadership skills, and occupational skills for in-school and out-of-school youth aged 14-24
demographic_requirements: Youth must meet low-income guidelines and one or more challenge definitions. Programs target in-school youth aged 14-21 and out-of-school youth aged 16-24.
eligibility_summary: Funding is available for organizations and agencies serving youth in South Central Connecticut. Youth participants must be referred by their school (for in-school youth) or meet age and income requirements (for out-of-school youth). Programs must align with WIOA guidelines and focus on work-based learning, employability, and career development.
